title: Dennis Lee
compiled_truth: Dennis Lee is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-06-23 to 2002-03-25), Dennis Lee sent 95 and received 301 emails, totalling 396 interactions. Top correspondents: [Michelle Lokay](people/michelle-lokay) (72), [Tk Lohman](people/tk-lohman) (59), [Lindy Donoho](people/lindy-donoho) (55), [Lorraine Lindberg](people/lorraine-lindberg) (55), [Craig Buehler](people/craig-buehler) (42).
